title: polygala russelliana
intro: Polygala russelliana, also known as Indian plantain or small milkwort, is a perennial plant species native to the Himalayan region and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, which are attributed to the presence of saponins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Polygala russelliana include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular remedy for respiratory issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Polygala russelliana is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
